story: Tourists spill into ruined Watercity. The host waves his cane: “Explore.” A quiet man in scuffed black-and-blue veers into a service alcove. A keypad by a sealed door glows—power still lives after two centuries. Past that door, machines hum; rows of stasis pods ring a chamber, some panels green—hundreds preserved alive below. He works a knife into the seam, glances back at the distracted crowd; drones buzz overhead.
implausible_knowledge: rows of stasis pods ring a chamber, some panels green—hundreds preserved alive below
question: Upon finding the powered keypad and testing the sealed door, what will the man plausibly do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Back away and radio the ship for immediate biohazard containment and rescue, locking down the area without breaching.
answer_without_knowledge: Pry the door open and enter cautiously with his drone to assess and document before calling it in.
